hooks.command: echo '[규칙] 1. 작업을 요청받으면 작은 단위로 분할하고, 각 단위마다 실제 동작 테스트를 완료한 후 다음 단계로 진행할 것. import 확인만으로는 부족함. 2. 모든 작업이 끝나면 사용자의 원래 prompt 요구사항을 하나씩 되짚어보고, 빠뜨린 것이 없는지 체크리스트로 확인할 것.'

allow: Bash(curl -s "https://www.compuzone.co.kr/product/product_list.htm?BigDivNo=4&MediumDivNo=1012&PageNum=1&firstOpen=1" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36")

Bash(curl -s https://www.compuzone.co.kr/script/product_list.js?utime=1774011857 -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H 'Referer: https://www.compuzone.co.kr/product/product_list.htm')

Bash(curl -s -X POST https://www.compuzone.co.kr/product/product_list.php -H 'Content-Type: application/x-www-form-urlencoded' -H "Referer: https://www.compuzone.co.kr/product/product_list.htm?BigDivNo=4&MediumDivNo=1012" -H "User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36" -H 'X-Requested-With: XMLHttpRequest' -d "actype=getList&BigDivNo=4&MediumDivNo=1012&DivNo=0&PageCount=60&StartNum=0&PageNum=1&PreOrder=recommand&lvm=L&ps_po=P&ScrollPage=1&ProductType=list&PageType=ProductList&setPricechk=N")
